[category]
matching
[prompt]
In Alice's Wonderland, secret processing rules are used on text.

x: not matched anywhere
y: matched but wrong position

0 00000001 1
1 10000101 3
2 10110101 5
3 10000111 4
4 10101000 3
5 11001000 3
6 00001000 1
7 00001001 2

01 10 00001000 1 match 6
12 21 00001000 1 match 6
23 32 00001001 2 match 7
34 43 11100101 5
45 54 10010111 5
56 65 10010101 4
67 76 10001101 4
70 07 10001000 2

13 31 01001000 2
24 42 00000001 1 match 0
35 53 10000101 3 match 1
46 64 10110101 5 match 2
57 75 10000111 4 match 3
60 06 10101000 3 match 4
71 17 01001000 2

03 30 10101000 3 match 4
14 41 01000000 1
25 52 00000001 1 match 0
36 63 10101101 5
47 74 11000111 5
50 05 10000000 1
61 16 00001000 1 match 6
72 27 00001001 2 match 7

04 40 10100000 2
15 51 00000000 a
26 62 00001001 2 match 7
37 73 11001101 5
